ddls:
CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the branch */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the branch */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the branch */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the branch */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links for the branch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the branch was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the branch was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_types" (
  "membership_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership type */,
  "membership_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership type (e.g., Individual, Family) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the membership type */,
  "age_limit" TEXT /* Age limit for the membership type (e.g., 'under 25', '25 and older') */,
  "validity_period" TEXT /* Validity period of the membership type (e.g., '1 year', '6 months') */,
  "max_members" INTEGER /* Maximum number of members allowed for this membership type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the membership type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the membership type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the fee belongs to */,
  "membership_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership type the fee is associated with */,
  "fee_name" TEXT /* Name of the fee (e.g., RCWST Dues, USA Dues) */,
  "fee_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the fee */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the fee is due */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the fee payment (e.g., 'annual', 'monthly') */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Amount of late fee if the payment is overdue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_membership_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_type_id") REFERENCES membership_types ("membership_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the member belongs to */,
  "membership_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership type the member has */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the club */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the member */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the membership subscription (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the member joined */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the member details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_membership_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_type_id") REFERENCES membership_types ("membership_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who made the payment */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., 'credit card', 'bank transfer') */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., 'completed', 'pending') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment history entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member the payment history belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., 'credit card', 'bank transfer') */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., 'completed', 'pending') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fundraisers" (
  "fundraiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fundraiser */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the fundraiser belongs to */,
  "fundraiser_name" TEXT /* Name of the fundraiser */,
  "fundraiser_date" TEXT /* Date the fundraiser took place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fundraiser */,
  "target_amount" TEXT /* Target amount for the fundraiser */,
  "amount_raised" TEXT /* Amount raised so far */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fundraiser was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fundraiser details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fundraiser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fundraisers_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_fundraisers" (
  "member_fundraiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member fundraiser participation */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who participated in the fundraiser */,
  "fundraiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fundraiser the member participated in */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the member participated in the fundraiser */,
  "amount_contributed" TEXT /* Amount contributed by the member to the fundraiser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the member participated in the fundraiser */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participation details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_fundraiser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_fundraisers_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_fundraisers_fundraiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("fundraiser_id") REFERENCES fundraisers ("fundraiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member the role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned to the member */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)
